title: Very Simple Sum
description: You are given two arrays $a$ and $b$, each consisting of $n$ integers. Your task is to calculate a very simple sum: $$ \sum_{1 \le x \le n} \sum_{1 \le y \le n} \sum_{1 \le z \le n} \sum_{1 \le w \le n} (a_x + a_y + a_z + a_w)^{(b_x \oplus b_y \oplus b_z \oplus b_w)} \mod 998244353 $$
input:
First line contains a single integer $n$ --- the number of elements in arrays $a$ and $b$.

Second line contains $n$ space-separated integers $a_i$ --- the elements of the array $a$.

Third line contains $n$ space-separated integers $b_i$ --- the elements of the array $b$.
output: Output a single integer --- the value of the very simple sum.
source: Contest, Open Cup, 2018/2019 Season, Stage 18: Grand Prix of Minsk
